metadata.notes: agent=yes daemon=incapable driver=gap:wait_turn — quota/rate-limit burndown leaves no trace in the tailed transcript JSONL; any usage/quota state lives in the SQLite protobuf store and the v1 adapter has no MetricsReader/RateLimitSnapshot path (route frozen).

assessment.body:
## Verdict

**agent=yes** — `agy` runs on a Google-account quota model (Gemini-family tiering); cumulative consumption exists account-side.

**daemon=incapable** — There is no `RateLimitSnapshot` surface for antigravity. Unlike claudecode (a statusLine hook POSTs a `rate_limits` block to the daemon), antigravity has NO hook delivery and NO MetricsReader. The transcript JSONL the daemon tails carries only `{step_index,source,type,status,created_at,content,tool_calls,thinking}` — `grep -iE 'tokens|usage|cost|cache'` over every sample transcript returns zero hits, and there is no `rate_limits`/`quota`/`UsedPercent` field anywhere in the tailed Source. Cross-turn `Windows[].UsedPercent` burndown therefore has no trace the daemon can read; `RateLimitSnapshot` stays nil. Same root cause as the sibling gemini-cli 5.7 (daemon=incapable: cross-turn burndown leaves no transcript trace), compounded here by the absence of any hook channel.

**driver=gap:wait_turn** — Moot under the freeze; the multi-turn recipe would need `wait_turn`, stubbed in the antigravity driver.

Unblock path: a hook or MetricsReader that surfaces a per-account quota window; re-assess afterward.
caveats: claudecode's quota path is hook-delivered (statusline POST); antigravity has no equivalent hook channel.
Even a future SQLite MetricsReader would surface tokens, not necessarily a rate-limit window with UsedPercent/ResetsAt.

sources.note: single transcripts Permission over JSONL; no MetricsReader, no hook installer, no RateLimitSnapshot path
envelope carries no usage/quota; tokens/cost live in SQLite protobuf store
sibling Gemini-family verdict: daemon=incapable (cross-turn burndown leaves no transcript trace)

recipe.reason: frozen (daemon=incapable): no RateLimitSnapshot surface for antigravity — no hook channel and no MetricsReader; quota state never reaches the tailed transcript JSONL.
